symptom_vector: High CPU utilization, CPU saturation, CPU overload, CPU usage spike, CPU stress

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [recommendationservice] (From Ground Truth)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_cpu_usage] in Metric data showing abnormal increase from 0.0/0.01 to 0.4 (2.0x change ratio) (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric data showing abnormal increase from 1.0 to 9.0 (1.6x change ratio) (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [rrt] in Metric data showing abnormal increase from 2.5-2.8k to 43-59k (1.8x change ratio) (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on combined features of pod_cpu_usage spike, pod_processes anomaly, and rrt degradation, determined cause is [pod_cpu_usage] (From Ground Truth)
